title: Pan-Seared Cod with Stir-Fry Vegetables
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the delicate taste of cod with the crunch of stir-fry vegetables. This recipe is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper.
Add the seasoned cod to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the cod from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the sliced carrots, bell peppers, and onions to the skillet.
Cook the vegetables for 4-5 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the tangy stir-fry sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the cooked cod to the skillet and toss with the vegetables and sauce.
Serve the cod and vegetables over fluffy rice, garnished with chopped green onions.
